en.value:
Partner with a research institute to develop a methodology to cost the implementation of the Domestic Violence Act and gauge the resource requirements for the implementation of multi-sectoral support services for women and girls subjected to violence.

Support the Ministry of Finance with a technical advisor on gender responsive budgeting to support capacity assessments and capacity development efforts and oversee the development and implementation of advocacy material and tools

Support the establishment of GRB units in select ministries and DDCs (institutional capacity development)

Support the Ministry of Women , Children and Social Welfare to prepare its sixth CEDAW periodic report which is due for submission in July 2015

Support civil society groups to draft a comprehensive CEDAW shadow report taking into account the Beijing + 20 process and the post 2015 discussions

Support travel for the Beijing + 20 process – South Asia, ESCAP processes and CSW 2015

Partial support to the Ministry of Finance to commission an external evaluation of its GRB work
The purpose of this outcome evaluation is to assess the Ministry of Finance, Government of Nepal’s interventions on gender responsive budgeting (GRB) over the period 2001-2013.

en.full:
Nepal Country Office Strategic Note and Annual Work Plan 2014-2017, Outcome area 3  and Outcome 5 
[Denmark Project - 00090401]
